blended.narrative: Cranmore Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,385 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 56°F.
Sunday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
